rules.name: Missing skip link
rules.description: Add a skip link to allow keyboard users to bypass navigation.
rules.title: Add skip navigation link
fix: Add a skip link at the top of the page
Link to the main content area

rules.name: Missing lang attribute
rules.description: Add lang attribute to the html element for screen readers.
rules.title: Add lang attribute to HTML
catches: Missing lang attribute on HTML element
Screen readers can't pronounce content correctly
fix: Add lang attribute to <html> tag (e.g., lang="en")
Use appropriate language code for the content

rules.name: Keyboard navigation issues
rules.description: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible.
rules.title: Ensure keyboard accessibility
catches: Users can't navigate with Tab key

rules.name: Missing live region for dynamic content
rules.description: Use aria-live for content that updates dynamically.
rules.title: Add live regions for dynamic content
fix: Add aria-live attribute to dynamic content regions
Use polite or assertive based on urgency

rules.name: Missing reduced motion preference
rules.description: Add media query for prefers-reduced-motion.
rules.title: Respect reduced motion preference
catches: Animations play for users who prefer reduced motion
fix: Disable or reduce animations for users who prefer it

rules.name: Short timeout without warning
rules.description: Sessions with short timeouts should warn users.
rules.title: Warn users of short timeouts
fix: Allow users to adjust timeout settings

rules.name: Unclear error messages
rules.description: Error messages should clearly explain what went wrong.
rules.title: Make error messages clear
catches: Users don't know how to fix errors
fix: Explain what went wrong and how to fix it

rules.name: Heading level skipped
rules.description: Heading levels should not skip (e.g., h1 to h3 without h2).
rules.title: Maintain proper heading hierarchy
catches: Heading levels skipped (e.g., h1 to h3)
Screen reader users can't navigate structure
fix: Don't skip from h1 to h3 without h2

rules.name: Image missing alt text
rules.description: Images need alt text for screen readers. Use empty alt="" for decorative images.
rules.title: Add alt text to images
fix: Add alt text to all images
Describe image content in alt text

rules.name: Missing ARIA labels
rules.description: Buttons and links need accessible names. Use aria-label or aria-labelledby.
rules.title: Add ARIA labels to interactive elements

rules.name: Insufficient link text
rules.description: Links should describe their destination. Avoid "click here" or "read more".
rules.title: Use descriptive link text
catches: Link text not descriptive (e.g., click here)
fix: Avoid generic phrases like click here

rules.name: Potential color contrast issue
rules.description: Text should have 4.5:1 contrast ratio against background.
rules.title: Ensure sufficient color contrast
catches: Text hard to read for visually impaired users
fix: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text

rules.name: Missing focus indicators
rules.description: Interactive elements need visible focus indicators for keyboard users.
rules.title: Add focus indicators
catches: Keyboard users can't see focused element

rules.name: Form input missing label
rules.description: Form inputs need associated labels for screen readers.
rules.title: Add labels to form inputs
catches: Screen readers can't identify field purpose
fix: Use for attribute to associate label

rules.name: Complex language may cause cognitive load
rules.description: Avoid complex sentences and jargon. Aim for reading level appropriate for audience.
rules.title: Use clear, simple language

rules.name: Inconsistent navigation across pages
rules.description: Navigation should be consistent across pages for predictability.
rules.title: Maintain consistent navigation

rules.name: Unpredictable behavior on focus/hover
rules.description: Focus and hover should not cause unexpected content changes.
rules.title: Make behavior predictable
fix: Don't change content on focus/hover alone

rules.name: No error prevention for forms
rules.description: Provide confirmation for important actions and reversible submissions.
rules.title: Add error prevention
fix: Add confirmation dialogs for important actions

rules.name: Missing help or instructions
rules.description: Provide help text and clear instructions for complex forms.
rules.title: Add help and instructions
catches: No help text for complex forms
fix: Add help text for complex fields

rules.name: Focus order not logical
rules.description: Tab order should follow visual layout from left to right, top to bottom.
rules.title: Ensure logical focus order
catches: Focus order doesn't follow visual layout

rules.name: Missing or unclear page title
rules.description: Each page should have a unique, descriptive title.
rules.title: Add descriptive page titles
fix: Add unique title to each page
Include page name and site name

rules.name: Missing semantic landmarks
rules.description: Use <header>, <nav>, <main>, <footer> for screen reader navigation.
rules.title: Use semantic HTML landmarks
fix: Add header, nav, main, footer elements

rules.name: Auto-playing media without controls
rules.description: Auto-playing audio/video must have controls and respect user preference.
rules.title: Don't auto-play media with sound

rules.name: CAPTCHA without accessible alternative
rules.description: CAPTCHA should have audio alternative or be replaceable with less exclusionary method.
rules.title: Provide CAPTCHA alternatives
catches: Users with disabilities can't complete verification

rules.name: Link purpose not clear from context
rules.description: Link purpose should be clear from link text alone or context.
rules.title: Clear link purpose

rules.name: Only one way to find page
rules.description: Users should have multiple ways to find pages (search, navigation, site map).
rules.title: Provide multiple ways to find pages
catches: Only one way to find pages

rules.name: Focus not visible
rules.description: Keyboard focus must have visible indicator at all times.
rules.title: Make focus clearly visible
catches: Keyboard users lose track of focus

rules.name: Link behavior changes context unexpectedly
rules.description: Links should not open new windows/tabs without warning.
rules.title: Don't change context unexpectedly
catches: Links open new windows without warning
fix: Announce link behavior to screen readers

rules.name: No error suggestions provided
rules.description: When errors are detected, suggest corrections.
rules.title: Provide error suggestions
catches: Users don't know how to fix errors

rules.name: Status messages not announced
rules.description: Status messages should be announced without focus change using aria-live.
rules.title: Announce status messages

rules.name: Clickable target too small
rules.description: Clickable targets must be at least 24 by 24 CSS pixels. Small targets are difficult for users with motor impairments.
rules.title: Use minimum 24x24px target size

rules.name: Drag operation without keyboard alternative
rules.description: Drag operations must have a keyboard alternative (click + move, or two clicks). Users cannot use drag with keyboards or assistive tech.
rules.title: Provide keyboard alternative for drag

rules.name: Focus indicator hidden
rules.description: When an element receives focus, it must not be completely hidden by other content (sticky headers, modals, etc.).
rules.title: Focus must not be hidden

rules.name: Text spacing restrictions
rules.description: Text should reflow when users adjust line-height, letter-spacing, or word-spacing. Avoid fixed px line-heights.
rules.title: Allow text spacing adjustments

rules.name: Horizontal scrolling required
rules.description: Content should not require horizontal scrolling at 320px width. Use word-wrap, overflow-wrap, or allow natural text reflow.
rules.title: Enable line wrapping

rules.name: useEffect with data fetching without caching
rules.description: useEffect with data fetching should be replaced with TanStack Query for better caching, error handling, and loading states.
rules.title: Use TanStack Query for data fetching
catches: Data fetching in useEffect without caching
fix: Use TanStack Query for data fetching

rules.name: Props passed through 3+ levels
rules.description: Props passed through 3+ levels. Consider React Context or component composition.
rules.title: Use context or composition to avoid prop drilling

rules.name: Generic try/catch with Something went wrong
rules.description: Generic try/catch with Something went wrong message. Add specific error handling.
rules.title: Add specific error handling
catches: Users don't know what went wrong

rules.name: Multiple console.log without context
rules.description: Multiple console.log statements without context. Use structured logging with appropriate log levels.
rules.title: Add context to console.log statements

rules.name: Files without corresponding tests
rules.description: No corresponding test file found. Add tests to ensure code reliability.
rules.title: Add tests for this file
catches: No test file for source file

rules.name: Server-only imports in client code
rules.description: Server-only modules imported in client code increase bundle size. Use dynamic imports or move server logic.
rules.title: Avoid server-only imports in client code
fix: Use dynamic imports for server modules
Move server logic to server components

rules.name: Authentication without authorization check
rules.description: Authentication is present but authorization checks are missing. Ensure users have permission for actions.
rules.title: Add authorization checks

rules.name: Subscription without unsubscribe
rules.description: Always unsubscribe from observables to prevent memory leaks. Use takeUntilDestroyed or unsubscribe.
rules.title: Unsubscribe from observables

rules.name: Manual change detection
rules.description: Manual change detection can cause performance issues. Use OnPush and async pipe.
rules.title: Avoid manual change detection

rules.name: Method call in template
rules.description: Method calls in templates run on every change detection. Use pipes or computed properties.
rules.title: Avoid method calls in templates

rules.name: Impure pipe with expensive computation
rules.description: Pipes should be pure by default for performance.
rules.title: Mark pure pipes

rules.name: API missing version in URL
rules.description: Include version in URL (e.g., /v1/users) for backward compatibility.
rules.title: Version APIs in URL
catches: API endpoints without version in URL

rules.name: Using header versioning only
rules.description: Header versioning is harder to discover and test.
rules.title: Prefer URL versioning

rules.name: Old API version not deprecated
rules.description: Mark deprecated versions with Sunset header and documentation.
rules.title: Deprecate old versions

rules.name: Missing changelog for API versions
rules.description: Document breaking changes between versions.
rules.title: Maintain changelog

rules.name: No /latest endpoint versioning
rules.description: Latest alias makes testing and migration easier.
rules.title: Support /latest for easier testing

rules.name: API missing error type
rules.description: API should return typed error responses for proper error handling.
rules.title: Add typed error responses

rules.name: API missing pagination
rules.description: Large data sets should be paginated.
rules.title: Add pagination to list endpoints

rules.name: API missing rate limiting
rules.description: APIs should have rate limiting to prevent abuse.
rules.title: Add rate limiting
fix: Use Redis for distributed rate limiting

rules.name: Sensitive data in request headers
rules.description: Avoid sending sensitive data like passwords or tokens in HTTP headers.
rules.title: Don't expose sensitive data in headers
fix: Use request body for sensitive data

rules.name: Public API directly calls private/internal API
rules.description: Public APIs should go through an API gateway rather than directly calling internal services.
rules.title: Use API Gateway pattern

rules.name: Missing request ID for tracing
rules.description: Add X-Request-ID or correlation ID for request tracing.
rules.title: Add request ID headers

rules.name: Missing deprecation header for old endpoints
rules.description: Deprecated endpoints should include Deprecation and Sunset headers.
rules.title: Add deprecation headers
catches: Clients don't know endpoint is deprecated

rules.name: Missing ETag for caching
rules.description: Add ETag headers to enable conditional requests and caching.
rules.title: Add ETag for conditional requests

rules.name: Missing idempotency for critical operations
rules.description: POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints should support idempotency keys to prevent duplicate operations.
rules.title: Add idempotency keys

rules.name: Circular dependency detected
rules.description: Circular dependencies cause tight coupling and make testing difficult. Refactor to use dependency injection.
rules.title: Break circular dependencies

rules.name: Hub module with too many dependencies
rules.description: Modules that depend on too many other modules indicate poor separation. Split into smaller modules.
rules.title: Split hub modules

rules.name: Orphan/unused module
rules.description: Modules with no dependencies may be dead code. Verify and remove.
rules.title: Remove orphan modules

rules.name: Database access in controller
rules.description: Controllers should only handle HTTP concerns. Move database logic to repositories/services.
rules.title: Move database logic to service layer

rules.name: Business logic in route handler
rules.description: Route handlers should delegate to service layer. Keep them thin.
rules.title: Extract business logic

rules.name: Missing service layer
rules.description: Business logic should be in a service layer, not in routes or controllers.
rules.title: Add service layer

rules.name: Raw SQL in route handlers
rules.description: Raw SQL in routes couples to database. Use repository pattern.
rules.title: Use repository pattern

rules.name: Anemic domain model
rules.description: Classes with only getters/setters are anemic. Add domain logic to models.
rules.title: Add behavior to domain models

rules.name: Feature envy anti-pattern
rules.description: Methods that access too much data from other classes should be moved there.
rules.title: Move method to data class
catches: Method accesses too much from other class

rules.name: Law of Demeter violation
rules.description: Excessive chaining (a.getB().getC().getD()) violates Demeter. Use delegates.
rules.title: Avoid method chaining

rules.name: God class detected
rules.description: Classes that do too much should be split into focused, single-responsibility classes.
rules.title: Split god class

rules.name: Spaghetti code structure
rules.description: Deeply nested, tangled code is hard to maintain. Refactor to clear structure.
rules.title: Refactor to clean structure

rules.name: Component too large
rules.description: Components should be focused. Split into smaller, composable components.
rules.title: Split large components

rules.name: Props drilling through many levels
rules.description: Props passed through 3+ levels indicate need for context or state management.
rules.title: Use context or state management

rules.name: Missing abstraction layer
rules.description: Direct implementations scattered throughout code. Use abstractions/interfaces.
rules.title: Add abstraction layers

rules.name: Hydrating everything
rules.description: Only hydrate components that need interactivity. Avoid client:load on static content.
rules.title: Use client directives only when needed
fix: Use client directives only when needed

rules.name: Missing prerender
rules.description: Static pages should use prerender for better performance.
rules.title: Add prerender for static pages

rules.name: Wrong hydration directive
rules.description: Choose appropriate directive: client:load, client:visible, client:idle, etc.
rules.title: Use correct hydration directive

rules.name: Cache entry missing TTL
rules.description: Cache entries should have expiration times.
rules.title: Set cache TTL

rules.name: Cache missing key prefix
rules.description: Key prefixes prevent collisions and aid debugging.
rules.title: Use cache key prefixes

rules.name: Missing stale-while-revalidate pattern
rules.description: Serve stale content while revalidating in background.
rules.title: Use stale-while-revalidate

rules.name: Missing cache invalidation strategy
rules.description: Have a clear strategy for when cached data becomes stale.
rules.title: Plan cache invalidation

rules.name: CI not using caching
rules.description: Cache node_modules, build outputs for faster CI runs.
rules.title: Enable dependency caching

rules.name: CI not running linters
rules.description: Run ESLint in CI to catch style issues before merge.
rules.title: Run lint in CI

rules.name: CI not running security scans
rules.description: Run npm audit, Snyk, or Dependabot in CI.
rules.title: Add security scanning

rules.name: CI not using fail-fast
rules.description: Fail fast on critical jobs, not on lint/test matrix.
rules.title: Use fail-fast strategically
catches: All jobs run even after failure

rules.name: CI jobs missing timeout
rules.description: Prevent hung jobs from blocking CI. Set reasonable timeouts.
rules.title: Set job timeouts

rules.name: CI not saving artifacts
rules.description: Save build outputs for debugging failed deployments.
rules.title: Save build artifacts

rules.name: CI using secrets directly
rules.description: Never hardcode secrets in CI configs. Use secret variables.
rules.title: Use CI secrets, not hardcoded values

rules.name: Missing .npmrc in CI
rules.description: .npmrc ensures consistent package resolution in CI.
rules.title: Add .npmrc for consistent installs

rules.name: Commented out code
rules.description: Commented out code reduces readability. Remove it or use version control.
rules.title: Remove commented code

rules.name: Console.log in code
rules.description: Console.log should be replaced with proper logging library.
rules.title: Use proper logging

rules.name: Potential dead code
rules.description: Dead code reduces maintainability. Remove unreachable code.
rules.title: Remove dead code

rules.name: Using console.log for errors
rules.description: Use proper error logging instead of console.log for errors.
rules.title: Use proper error logging

rules.name: Using console.log instead of logger
rules.description: Use a structured logging library instead of console.log.
rules.title: Use structured logging

rules.name: CLI produces no output
rules.description: CLI tools should provide feedback to users.
rules.title: Add output to CLI

rules.name: CLI missing error handling
rules.description: Handle errors gracefully and exit with proper codes.
rules.title: Add error handling to CLI

rules.name: CLI missing help
rules.description: CLIs should have --help option.
rules.title: Add help option to CLI

rules.name: CLI missing version
rules.description: CLIs should have --version option.
rules.title: Add version option to CLI

rules.name: CLI using manual argument parsing
rules.description: Use a library like yargs, commander, or meow for robust argument parsing.
rules.title: Use a CLI parser library

rules.name: Deeply nested code
rules.description: Deeply nested code is hard to read. Consider early returns or extraction.
rules.title: Reduce nesting depth

rules.name: Too many function parameters
rules.description: Too many parameters make functions hard to use. Consider passing an object.
rules.title: Reduce function parameters

rules.name: Global state detected
rules.description: Global state causes unexpected side effects. Use dependency injection.
rules.title: Avoid global state

rules.name: Empty catch block
rules.description: Empty catch blocks hide errors. Add proper error handling.
rules.title: Handle errors properly

rules.name: Potential circular dependency
rules.description: Circular dependencies cause coupling issues. Refactor to remove them.
rules.title: Avoid circular dependencies

rules.name: Potential dead code
rules.description: Unused code should be removed. It confuses readers and bloats builds.
rules.title: Remove dead code

rules.name: Console log statements
rules.description: Console.log statements should be removed in production.
rules.title: Remove console logs

rules.name: File too large
rules.description: Files over 500 lines are hard to maintain. Consider splitting into smaller modules.
rules.title: Split large files

rules.name: High cyclomatic complexity
rules.description: High cyclomatic complexity indicates complex logic. Consider refactoring.
rules.title: Reduce cyclomatic complexity

rules.name: Missing CORS configuration
rules.description: CORS should be explicitly configured, not left permissive.
rules.title: Configure CORS properly
catches: No control over who accesses API

rules.name: CORS allows all origins
rules.description: Allowing all origins (* ) is a security risk. Specify allowed origins.
rules.title: Don't use wildcard origin in production

rules.name: CORS credentials with wildcard origin
rules.description: Cannot use credentials with wildcard origin. Specify exact origins.
rules.title: Fix credentials with wildcard

rules.name: Missing Access-Control-Expose-Headers
rules.description: Custom headers need to be exposed to be accessible from frontend.
rules.title: Expose custom headers

rules.name: Missing Access-Control-Max-Age
rules.description: Setting Max-Age reduces preflight requests.
rules.title: Set preflight cache duration

rules.name: Inline styles detected
rules.description: Inline styles prevent CSS optimization and reduce maintainability.
rules.title: Use CSS classes instead of inline styles

rules.name: Global CSS without scoping
rules.description: Use CSS modules, CSS-in-JS, or scoped styles to prevent global namespace pollution.
rules.title: Scope CSS to components

rules.name: Overuse of !important
rules.description: !important breaks CSS specificity and makes maintenance difficult.
rules.title: Avoid !important declarations

rules.name: High CSS specificity
rules.description: High specificity selectors are hard to override and maintain.
rules.title: Keep specificity low

rules.name: Magic numbers in CSS
rules.description: Hardcoded pixel values make responsive design harder. Use CSS variables.
rules.title: Use CSS custom properties

rules.name: Hardcoded color values
rules.description: Hardcoded colors prevent theming. Use CSS variables.
rules.title: Use CSS custom properties for colors

rules.name: Using margins instead of gap
rules.description: The gap property is cleaner than margin hacks for flex/grid containers.
rules.title: Use gap for flex/grid spacing

rules.name: Web fonts without font-display
rules.description: font-display prevents invisible text while fonts load.
rules.title: Add font-display for web fonts

rules.name: Duplicate CSS values across files
rules.description: Colors, font sizes, and spacing values used multiple times should be defined as CSS variables for consistency and easier maintenance.
rules.title: Use CSS custom properties for repeated values

rules.name: N+1 Query Problem
rules.description: Use eager loading or JOINs to avoid N+1 queries.
rules.title: Fix N+1 query problem

rules.name: SQL injection via string concatenation
rules.description: String concatenation in SQL queries creates SQL injection vulnerabilities. Use parameterized queries.
rules.title: Use parameterized queries

rules.name: Missing Database Index
rules.description: Missing index on frequently queried columns.
rules.title: Add database index
fix: Add index to frequently queried columns

rules.name: Eager Loading Everything
rules.description: Eager loading all relations causes performance issues. Load only needed relations.
rules.title: Avoid eager loading everything

rules.name: Prisma include() without where
rules.description: include() without where loads all relations. Add filtering.
rules.title: Prisma include without where

rules.name: Missing lockfile
rules.description: Lockfiles ensure consistent dependency versions across environments.
rules.title: Use lockfiles for reproducible builds

rules.name: Missing private field for private packages
rules.description: Set "private": true to prevent accidental publishing.
rules.title: Mark private packages as private

rules.name: Missing repository field
rules.description: Repository field links package to source code.
rules.title: Add repository field

rules.name: Container running as root
rules.description: Running as root is a security risk. Use USER directive.
rules.title: Run container as non-root user

rules.name: Missing HEALTHCHECK instruction
rules.description: Health checks allow Docker to monitor container health.
rules.title: Add HEALTHCHECK instruction

rules.name: Using latest tag
rules.description: Using latest can cause unpredictable builds. Pin to specific versions.
rules.title: Use specific version tags

rules.name: Exposing all ports
rules.description: Exposing unnecessary ports increases attack surface.
rules.title: Only expose necessary ports

rules.name: No multi-stage build
rules.description: Multi-stage builds reduce final image size by excluding build dependencies.
rules.title: Use multi-stage builds

rules.name: Missing labels
rules.description: Labels help with container management and organization.
rules.title: Add metadata labels

rules.name: Using sudo in Dockerfile
rules.description: Sudo is unnecessary when running as non-root user.
rules.title: Avoid sudo in Dockerfile

rules.name: No cleanup in same layer
rules.description: Combine apt-get install and cleanup in same RUN to reduce image size.
rules.title: Clean up in same layer

rules.name: Missing API documentation
rules.description: API endpoints should be documented with OpenAPI/Swagger.
rules.title: Add API documentation
catches: Hard for consumers to use API

rules.name: Missing README
rules.description: Every project should have a README explaining what it is and how to use it.
rules.title: Add README
catches: Hard for others to understand project

rules.name: Missing environment example file
rules.description: Projects using environment variables should have a .env.example file documenting required vars.
rules.title: Add .env.example
catches: No documentation of required env vars
Hard for contributors to know what vars needed

rules.name: Missing CONTRIBUTING guide
rules.description: Open source projects should have a CONTRIBUTING guide.
rules.title: Add CONTRIBUTING guide
catches: Hard for contributors to know how to help
fix: Document how to set up dev environment

rules.name: Environment variables not documented
rules.description: All environment variables used in code should be documented in .env.example.
rules.title: Document environment variables
catches: Code uses env vars not in .env.example
Hard for team to know all required vars

rules.name: Email not sent via provider
rules.description: Use SendGrid, AWS SES, Mailgun. Direct SMTP is unreliable.
rules.title: Use email service provider
fix: Use SendGrid, AWS SES, or Mailgun

rules.name: Using hardcoded email content
rules.description: Templates allow non-devs to edit emails and support i18n.
rules.title: Use email templates

rules.name: No email open/click tracking
rules.description: Track opens and clicks to measure engagement.
rules.title: Track email metrics

rules.name: Missing unsubscribe link
rules.description: Commercial emails must have working unsubscribe (CAN-SPAM, GDPR).
rules.title: Include unsubscribe link

rules.name: No proper From address
rules.description: Set proper From and Reply-To addresses.
rules.title: Configure From/Reply-To

rules.name: No DKIM/SPF configured
rules.description: DKIM and SPF prevent email spoofing.
rules.title: Configure email authentication

rules.name: Missing error handling
rules.description: Async operations should have proper error handling. Note: This is a suggestion - if you handle errors differently, you can ignore this.
rules.title: Add error handling

rules.name: Promise without catch
rules.description: Unhandled promise rejections can crash your app.
rules.title: Add .catch() to promises

rules.name: Async function without await
rules.description: Not awaiting async functions can lead to race conditions.
rules.title: Await async function calls

rules.name: Swallowing errors
rules.description: Empty catch blocks hide errors. Log or handle them properly.
rules.title: Don't swallow errors

rules.name: React app missing error boundary
rules.description: React apps should have error boundaries to catch rendering errors.
rules.title: Add error boundary component

rules.name: Throwing errors in callbacks
rules.description: Throwing in callbacks can cause unhandled exceptions. Use error parameters instead.
rules.title: Don't throw in callbacks

rules.name: Empty catch block
rules.description: Empty catch blocks silently swallow errors. Add error handling or logging.
rules.title: Handle errors in catch blocks

rules.name: Missing finally block
rules.description: Finally blocks ensure cleanup code runs regardless of errors.
rules.title: Add finally block for cleanup

rules.name: Function without try-catch
rules.description: Functions that perform async operations, I/O, or external calls should have error handling. Pure functions with no side effects don't need try-catch. Note: This is a best-effort check and may have false positives - use .attuneignore if needed.
rules.title: Add error handling to async/I/O functions
fix: Add try-catch to functions with external calls

rules.name: Async function not awaited
rules.description: Async functions should be awaited or have their promises handled properly.
rules.title: Await async functions
fix: Add await to async function calls
Handle returned promises with .then() or await

rules.name: Synchronous code in async route handler
rules.description: Express route handlers should be async for proper error handling.
rules.title: Use async/await in route handlers

rules.name: Missing error handler middleware
rules.description: Express apps should have error handling middleware.
rules.title: Add error handler middleware

rules.name: Missing security headers
rules.description: Add Helmet middleware for security headers.
rules.title: Add security headers with Helmet

rules.name: No JSON schema for route
rules.description: Fastify routes should have JSON schema for validation and serialization.
rules.title: Add JSON schema to route

rules.name: Async route without try-catch
rules.description: Fastify route handlers should use async/await with proper error handling.
rules.title: Use async/await properly

rules.name: No rate limiting
rules.description: Add rate limiting to protect against abuse.
rules.title: Add rate limiting

rules.name: Form missing validation
rules.description: Forms should have both client-side and server-side validation.
rules.title: Add form validation

rules.name: Form submit not prevented
rules.description: Use event.preventDefault() on form submission.
rules.title: Prevent default form submission

rules.name: GraphQL subscriptions not authenticated
rules.description: Subscriptions should require authentication like queries/mutations.
rules.title: Authenticate subscriptions

rules.name: GraphQL subscriptions missing rate limit
rules.description: Limit concurrent subscriptions per user to prevent abuse.
rules.title: Limit subscription connections

rules.name: Subscription payload not validated
rules.description: Validate connection params and payload data.
rules.title: Validate subscription payloads

rules.name: GraphQL N+1 query problem
rules.description: N+1 queries occur when resolvers fetch related data individually. Use DataLoader to batch requests.
rules.title: Use DataLoader for batch queries
catches: Multiple database calls for related data

rules.name: Missing query depth limiting
rules.description: Unlimited query depth can cause denial of service. Add max depth validation.
rules.title: Add query depth limiting

rules.name: Missing GraphQL response caching
rules.description: GraphQL queries can benefit from caching to reduce server load.
rules.title: Add response caching

rules.name: GraphQL introspection enabled in production
rules.description: Disable GraphQL introspection in production to prevent schema exposure.
rules.title: Disable introspection in production

rules.name: Query variables not used
rules.description: Hardcoded values in queries reduce cacheability and allow injection.
rules.title: Use query variables

rules.name: Mutation without payload type
rules.description: Return structured payload types from mutations for better type safety.
rules.title: Use payload types for mutations

rules.name: Multiple arguments instead of Input type
rules.description: Use GraphQL Input types for mutations with multiple arguments.
rules.title: Use Input types for complex arguments

rules.name: Hardcoded string instead of i18n
rules.description: Hardcoded strings prevent localization. Use translation functions.
rules.title: Use i18n for strings

rules.name: Missing locale configuration
rules.description: Define supported locales for the application.
rules.title: Configure supported locales

rules.name: Missing fallback language
rules.description: Configure fallback when translation is missing.
rules.title: Set fallback language

rules.name: Plural forms not handled
rules.description: Different languages have different plural rules.
rules.title: Handle plural forms

rules.name: Using hardcoded date formats
rules.description: Date formats vary by locale. Use Intl.DateTimeFormat.
rules.title: Use locale-aware date formatting

rules.name: Using hardcoded number formats
rules.description: Number formats (decimal separators) vary by locale.
rules.title: Use locale-aware number formatting

rules.name: Missing liveness probe
rules.description: Liveness probes detect hung containers that need restart.
rules.title: Add liveness probe

rules.name: Missing readiness probe
rules.description: Readiness probes prevent traffic to unhealthy pods.
rules.title: Add readiness probe

rules.name: Missing resource limits
rules.description: Prevent resource starvation and set QoS class.
rules.title: Set resource limits and requests

rules.name: Missing PodDisruptionBudget
rules.description: Ensure minimum replicas during voluntary disruptions.
rules.title: Add PodDisruptionBudget

rules.name: Missing security context
rules.description: Run containers as non-root with read-only filesystem.
rules.title: Set security context

rules.name: No HorizontalPodAutoscaler
rules.description: HPA enables automatic scaling based on load.
rules.title: Add HPA for scaling

rules.name: Logging sensitive data
rules.description: Passwords, tokens, and PII should never be logged.
rules.title: Don't log sensitive data
fix: Use structured logging with field allowlists

rules.name: Console.log in code
rules.description: Debug statements should be removed or replaced with proper logging.
rules.title: Remove console.log statements

rules.name: Hardcoded SQL Queries
rules.description: Hardcoded SQL queries reduce maintainability. Use query builders.
rules.title: Use query builders or ORMs

rules.name: Manual useState for form fields
rules.description: Manual useState for each form field reduces maintainability. Use form libraries.
rules.title: Use form libraries
fix: Use React Hook Form or Formik

rules.name: Potential DRY violation
rules.description: Potential DRY violation - duplicate code chunks found across multiple files. Extract to shared utility.
rules.title: Extract repeated code
catches: Code repeated multiple times across files
Duplicate code chunks that should be extracted

rules.name: Magic numbers in code
rules.description: Magic numbers reduce readability. Use named constants instead.
rules.title: Use constants

rules.name: Hardcoded values
rules.description: Hardcoded values should be extracted to configuration files.
rules.title: Extract configuration

rules.name: Long file
rules.description: Files should be kept under 500 lines for maintainability.
rules.title: Split long files

rules.name: Complex function
rules.description: Functions should be simple and focused on a single task.
rules.title: Simplify complex functions

rules.name: Deeply nested code
rules.description: Deeply nested code is hard to read and maintain.
rules.title: Reduce nesting

rules.name: God object
rules.description: Objects that do too much should be split into smaller, focused objects.
rules.title: Split god objects

rules.name: Feature envy
rules.description: Functions that access too much data from other objects should be moved closer to that data.
rules.title: Move code to data
catches: Function uses too much external data
fix: Move method to the class it uses most

rules.name: Data clump
rules.description: Groups of variables passed together should be extracted into their own class or object.
rules.title: Extract data clumps

rules.name: Migration files not timestamped
rules.description: Timestamp-based names ensure consistent ordering across environments.
rules.title: Use timestamped migrations

rules.name: Migration without rollback
rules.description: Always provide up() and down() or use .sql with reverse.
rules.title: Write reversible migrations

rules.name: Missing seed data
rules.description: Seed data ensures consistent reference data across environments.
rules.title: Add seed data for reference tables

rules.name: Index created without CONCURRENTLY
rules.description: CONCURRENTLY creates indexes without locking writes.
rules.title: Use CONCURRENTLY for production indexes

rules.name: Migration not using schema
rules.description: Group objects in schemas for better organization.
rules.title: Use database schema

rules.name: Risky operation without backup
rules.description: DROP TABLE, TRUNCATE, DELETE without WHERE need backups.
rules.title: Backup before destructive changes

rules.name: No offline support for critical features
rules.description: Critical features should work offline using service workers.
rules.title: Add offline support

rules.name: Missing splash screen
rules.description: Splash screens improve perceived startup time on mobile.
rules.title: Add splash screen

rules.name: Missing viewport meta tag
rules.description: Viewport meta tag is required for proper mobile rendering.
rules.title: Add viewport meta tag
fix: Add viewport meta tag to HTML head

rules.name: Touch targets too small
rules.description: Touch targets should be at least 44x44 pixels for accessibility.
rules.title: Increase touch target size
fix: Test touch targets on actual devices

rules.name: Swipe gestures may conflict with browser
rules.description: Custom swipe gestures may conflict with browser navigation. Add prevention.
rules.title: Handle swipe conflicts
catches: Browser navigation conflicts with app gestures
fix: Use passive: false for event listeners

rules.name: PWA not installed
rules.description: Progressive Web Apps provide better mobile experience with install prompt.
rules.title: Consider PWA

rules.name: No orientation handling
rules.description: App should handle both portrait and landscape orientations.
rules.title: Handle orientation changes
fix: Add CSS media queries for orientation

rules.name: Notch/safe area not handled
rules.description: Use env(safe-area-inset-*) for notches and system UI.
rules.title: Handle safe areas

rules.name: Background processes may drain battery
rules.description: Avoid unnecessary background processing to preserve battery.
rules.title: Optimize background processes

rules.name: No deep linking support
rules.description: Support deep links to specific app screens from external URLs.
rules.title: Add deep linking
catches: No direct links to app screens

rules.name: Missing health check endpoint
rules.description: Health checks are required for container orchestration (K8s, ECS).
rules.title: Add health check endpoint
catches: Load balancer sends traffic to failed instances

rules.name: Missing metrics endpoint
rules.description: Expose metrics for monitoring and alerting.
rules.title: Add Prometheus metrics

rules.name: Missing graceful shutdown
rules.description: Close connections and finish processing before exiting.
rules.title: Handle SIGTERM gracefully

rules.name: Missing error tracking
rules.description: Use Sentry, Bugsnag, or similar for error monitoring.
rules.title: Add error tracking

rules.name: Missing distributed tracing
rules.description: Trace requests across services for debugging.
rules.title: Add distributed tracing

rules.name: Missing alerting configuration
rules.description: Set up alerts for critical metrics and errors.
rules.title: Configure alerting

rules.name: Business logic in controller
rules.description: Controllers should handle HTTP, not business logic.
rules.title: Move business logic to service layer
catches: Business logic mixed with HTTP handling

rules.name: Fat model
rules.description: Models should be focused and not contain unrelated logic.
rules.title: Split large models

rules.name: useState/useEffect in Server Component
rules.description: useState/useEffect can only be used in Client Components. Add 'use client' or refactor.
rules.title: Move client code to client component
fix: Add 'use client' at top of component
Extract client logic to separate component
Pass data from server to client

rules.name: Unnecessary 'use client' directive
rules.description: 'use client' makes the component a Client Component. Use only if you need hooks or browser APIs.
rules.title: Remove unnecessary 'use client' directive
fix: Remove 'use client' if hooks not needed

rules.name: Missing 'use server' for server actions
rules.description: Server actions should be marked with 'use server' directive.
rules.title: Add 'use server' for server actions
catches: Actions run on client instead of server
fix: Place server actions in separate files

rules.name: fetch() without cache option
rules.description: fetch() without cache option may cause unnecessary fetches.
rules.title: Add cache option to fetch

rules.name: Dynamic data without cache config
rules.description: Dynamic data should have explicit cache configuration.
rules.title: Configure cache for dynamic data

rules.name: State in shared layout
rules.description: State in shared layouts causes all pages to re-render. Move state to client components.
rules.title: Don't use state in shared layout
catches: All pages re-render when state changes
fix: Use context providers in client components

rules.name: Dynamic metadata without generate
rules.description: Dynamic metadata should use generateMetadata function.
rules.title: Use generateMetadata for dynamic metadata

rules.name: next/image without optimization config
rules.description: next/image should have proper optimization configuration.
rules.title: Configure next/image optimization

rules.name: Google Fonts without optimization
rules.description: Use next/font/google for optimized font loading.
rules.title: Use next/font for Google Fonts
fix: Remove link tags to Google Fonts

rules.name: Missing dynamic imports for heavy components
rules.description: Heavy components should be lazy loaded with dynamic imports.
rules.title: Use dynamic imports for heavy components

rules.name: Parallel route without default.tsx
rules.description: Parallel routes need a default.tsx to handle unmatched slots.
rules.title: Add default component for parallel routes
catches: User sees nothing when slot inactive
fix: Handle both matched and unmatched states

rules.name: Secrets in public config
rules.description: Runtime config public keys are exposed to the client. Use private keys for secrets.
rules.title: Move secrets out of public config
fix: Never put secrets in public section

rules.name: Sync code in server route
rules.description: Server routes should use async/await for proper error handling.
rules.title: Use async/await in server routes

rules.name: Webhook not verified
rules.description: Always verify webhook signatures to prevent spoofed payment events.
rules.title: Verify webhook signatures

rules.name: Payment request without idempotency
rules.description: Prevent duplicate charges by using idempotency keys for payment requests.
rules.title: Use idempotency keys

rules.name: 3D Secure not implemented
rules.description: 3D Secure is required for SCA compliance in EU.
rules.title: Implement 3D Secure

rules.name: Storing card details directly
rules.description: Never store card details. Use provider tokenization (Stripe tokens, etc.)
rules.title: Use payment provider tokenization
fix: Store only token, not card data

rules.name: Missing refund functionality
rules.description: Have a clear refund process for returns and disputes.
rules.title: Implement refund process

rules.name: Webhook handler missing retry logic
rules.description: Payment providers retry failed webhooks. Files with webhook/stripe/payment patterns should handle duplicates. Note: Files without payment-related patterns are ignored.
rules.title: Handle webhook retries

rules.name: Sandbox API keys in production
rules.description: Sandbox keys won't process real payments.
rules.title: Use production keys only in prod

rules.name: Large bundle size
rules.description: Large bundles hurt load time. Use dynamic imports for code splitting.
rules.title: Code splitting for large bundles

rules.name: Synchronous file operations
rules.description: Use async/await for I/O operations to avoid blocking.
rules.title: Avoid synchronous operations

rules.name: Potential memory leak
rules.description: Global variables and uncached arrays can cause memory leaks.
rules.title: Check for potential memory leaks

rules.name: Mutable object mutation
rules.description: Mutating objects creates side effects. Use immutable patterns.
rules.title: Prefer immutability

rules.name: Inefficient regex in loop
rules.description: Inefficient regex can slow down execution. Compile regexes outside loops.
rules.title: Optimize regex patterns

rules.name: Missing caching for expensive operations
rules.description: Expensive operations should be cached.
rules.title: Add caching for expensive operations

rules.name: Undebounced event handler
rules.description: Frequent events like scroll/resize should be debounced.
rules.title: Debounce frequent events

rules.name: Unoptimized images
rules.description: Images should be optimized and lazy loaded.
rules.title: Optimize images

rules.name: Long list without virtualization
rules.description: Long lists should use virtualization for performance.
rules.title: Virtualize long lists

rules.name: Missing resource preload
rules.description: Critical resources should be preloaded.
rules.title: Preload critical resources

rules.name: Heavy computation on main thread
rules.description: Heavy computations should be moved to web workers.
rules.title: Offload to web worker

rules.name: Heavy dependency detected
rules.description: Heavy dependencies impact bundle size. Consider alternatives.
rules.title: Check for heavy dependencies

rules.name: Server-only imports in client code
rules.description: Server-only modules should not be imported in client code.
rules.title: Remove server-only imports from client
fix: Use dynamic imports for server modules

rules.name: Class decorator impact
rules.description: Decorators can impact performance. Use them carefully.
rules.title: Consider decorator impact

rules.name: Expensive computation in render
rules.description: Expensive computations in render methods slow down rendering.
rules.title: Move expensive computations out of render

rules.name: .bind() in render method
rules.description: Using .bind() in render creates new functions on each render.
rules.title: Avoid .bind() in render

rules.name: No caching headers
rules.description: Static assets should have cache headers for better performance.
rules.title: Add caching headers

rules.name: No pagination on list endpoints
rules.description: List endpoints without pagination can return too much data.
rules.title: Add pagination to list endpoints

rules.name: Excessive logging detected
rules.description: Excessive logging can impact performance.
rules.title: Reduce logging in production

rules.name: Duplicate dependencies detected
rules.description: Duplicate dependencies increase bundle size. Use dedupe.
rules.title: Remove duplicate dependencies

rules.name: Unused dependencies detected
rules.description: Unused dependencies bloat the project. Use depcheck tool.
rules.title: Remove unused dependencies

rules.name: Third-party tracking scripts
rules.description: Third-party scripts impact load time. Audit and defer non-essential ones.
rules.title: Audit third-party scripts

rules.name: Potential tree shaking issues
rules.description: Ensure ES modules and sideEffects: false for better tree shaking.
rules.title: Enable tree shaking

rules.name: Event listener without cleanup
rules.description: Event listeners should be removed when no longer needed to prevent memory leaks.
rules.title: Clean up event listeners

rules.name: Job missing timeout
rules.description: Jobs should have timeouts to prevent hanging processes.
rules.title: Set job timeouts

rules.name: Job missing retry configuration
rules.description: Queue jobs should have explicit retry/attempts configuration. Note: This rule checks if queue-related files have retry config. Files without queue patterns are ignored.
rules.title: Configure job retries

rules.name: Job missing deduplication
rules.description: Prevent duplicate jobs using idempotency keys.
rules.title: Add job deduplication

rules.name: Job queue missing priority
rules.description: Prioritize critical jobs over background tasks.
rules.title: Use priority queues

rules.name: Synchronous job in request handler
rules.description: Long-running tasks should be queued, not processed synchronously.
rules.title: Offload to background queue
fix: Add job to queue, don't await

rules.name: useEffect without exhaustive deps
rules.description: useEffect missing dependencies in deps array. This can cause stale closures.
rules.title: Add exhaustive deps to useEffect
fix: Add all dependencies to deps array

rules.name: useEffect with empty deps + state
rules.description: useEffect with empty deps array that updates state can cause infinite loop.
rules.title: Fix infinite loop in useEffect

rules.name: Hooks called conditionally
rules.description: React hooks must be called unconditionally at the top level of a component.
rules.title: Move hooks outside conditionals

rules.name: Map without keys
rules.description: Missing key prop in list rendering. Keys help React identify changed items.
rules.title: Add key prop to list items

rules.name: useCallback without proper deps
rules.description: useCallback without proper dependencies can lead to stale closures.
rules.title: Add proper dependencies to useCallback

rules.name: Expensive computation in render
rules.description: Non-reactive values computed in render cause unnecessary re-renders.
rules.title: Use useMemo for expensive computations

rules.name: Component with random values
rules.description: Components with random values in render cause unnecessary re-renders and break reconciliation.
rules.title: Remove random values from render
fix: Move random values to useMemo with dependencies
Generate random values in parent and pass as props

rules.name: Duplicate keys in lists
rules.description: Duplicate keys cause incorrect rendering and reconciliation issues.
rules.title: Fix duplicate keys in lists
fix: Generate IDs with a proper ID generator
Avoid using array index as key

rules.name: Legacy shouldComponentUpdate
rules.description: shouldComponentUpdate is deprecated. Use React.memo for function components.
rules.title: Use React.memo instead of shouldComponentUpdate
fix: Convert to functional component with React.memo

rules.name: Direct DOM manipulation
rules.description: Direct DOM manipulation bypasses React reconciliation. Use refs sparingly.
rules.title: Avoid direct DOM manipulation

rules.name: Mutating context value
rules.description: Mutating context value directly breaks reactivity. Use setState.
rules.title: Don't mutate context value
fix: Create update methods in context provider

rules.name: forwardRef without useImperativeHandle
rules.description: forwardRef without useImperativeHandle can leak implementation details.
rules.title: Use useImperativeHandle with forwardRef
fix: Use useImperativeHandle to expose specific methods
Consider not using ref at all

rules.name: Async function in render
rules.description: Async functions in render cause issues. Use useEffect for async operations.
rules.title: Don't use async functions in render
fix: Use event handlers for async actions
Call setState in callbacks, not directly in render

rules.name: .bind() in render method
rules.description: Binding functions in render creates new functions on each render. Use useCallback.
rules.title: Don't bind in render
catches: Creating new function on every render
fix: Use arrow functions in class properties

rules.name: Mutating state object directly
rules.description: Mutating state directly breaks React. Always use setState with new object.
rules.title: Don't mutate state object
fix: Create new object with spread operator
Always return new object from setState

rules.name: Component without PropTypes or TypeScript
rules.description: Components should have typed props for better maintainability and catch bugs early.
rules.title: Add types to React components

rules.name: useEffect may have missing dependencies
rules.description: Missing dependencies in useEffect can cause stale closure bugs.
rules.title: Add exhaustive deps to useEffect
fix: Add all used variables to deps array
Use useCallback for functions in deps

rules.name: Loader error not handled
rules.description: Loaders should have error handling for proper error states.
rules.title: Handle errors in loader

rules.name: No ErrorBoundary in route
rules.description: Routes should have ErrorBoundary for graceful error handling.
rules.title: Add ErrorBoundary to route

rules.name: Client-only code in loader
rules.description: Client-only code in loader runs on server. Move to clientLoader or useEffect.
rules.title: Move client-only code to clientLoader or useEffect

rules.name: Missing pagination on list endpoints
rules.description: Without pagination, list endpoints can return unbounded results causing memory issues and slow responses.
rules.title: Add pagination to list endpoints
catches: API endpoints returning all records without limits
No page/limit parameters on list routes
fix: Add page and limit query parameters

rules.name: Potential N+1 query problem
rules.description: N+1 queries occur when fetching records then looping to get related data. Use JOINs or eager loading.
rules.title: Use eager loading
catches: Loop fetching related data for each item
fix: Use ORM's include/with for eager loading

rules.name: No caching detected
rules.description: Frequently accessed data should be cached to reduce database load.
rules.title: Add caching layer

rules.name: Synchronous blocking operations
rules.description: Synchronous operations block the event loop. Use async/await for I/O operations.
rules.title: Use async operations
fix: Move to worker threads if needed

rules.name: No rate limiting detected
rules.description: APIs without rate limiting are vulnerable to abuse and DDoS attacks.
rules.title: Add rate limiting
fix: Add stricter limits for auth endpoints

rules.name: Route without authentication
rules.description: API endpoints should require authentication unless explicitly public.
rules.title: Add authentication

rules.name: Potential missing authorization checks
rules.description: After authentication, verify user has permission to access the resource.
rules.title: Add authorization checks

rules.name: Potential missing tenant isolation
rules.description: Multi-tenant apps must filter by tenant ID to prevent data leaks between tenants.
rules.title: Add tenant isolation
catches: Users can see other tenants' data

rules.name: No graceful shutdown handling
rules.description: Handle SIGTERM/SIGINT to close connections and finish processing requests before exiting.
rules.title: Implement graceful shutdown

rules.name: No health check endpoint
rules.description: Health checks (/health, /ready) are needed for load balancers and orchestration.
rules.title: Add health check endpoint

rules.name: API not versioned
rules.description: APIs should be versioned (/v1/, /v2/) to allow breaking changes without affecting clients.
rules.title: Version your API

rules.name: No standardized error handler
rules.description: Errors should follow consistent format across all endpoints.
rules.title: Standardize error responses

rules.name: No request ID tracking
rules.description: Add X-Request-ID headers for request tracing across services.
rules.title: Add request ID tracking

rules.name: Missing or overly permissive CORS
rules.description: CORS should whitelist specific origins, not use wildcard * in production.
rules.title: Configure CORS properly

rules.name: Session fixation vulnerability
rules.description: Session IDs should be regenerated after authentication to prevent fixation attacks.
rules.title: Regenerate session on login
catches: Same ID before and after auth

rules.name: Missing input sanitization
rules.description: All user input should be validated and sanitized before use.
rules.title: Sanitize all inputs

rules.name: Missing CSRF protection
rules.description: State-changing requests need CSRF tokens for browser clients.
rules.title: Add CSRF protection

rules.name: Missing HTTPS enforcement
rules.description: Redirect HTTP to HTTPS and set HSTS header.
rules.title: Enforce HTTPS

rules.name: No database connection pooling
rules.description: Without connection pooling, each request creates a new connection causing latency.
rules.title: Use connection pooling

rules.name: No idempotency for mutations
rules.description: POST/PATCH/DELETE endpoints should support idempotency to handle retry safely.
rules.title: Add idempotency keys

rules.name: Hardcoded API keys/secrets
rules.description: API keys and secrets should be stored in environment variables, not in source code.
rules.title: Remove hardcoded secrets
catches: Hardcoded API keys, secrets, tokens, or passwords in source files
AWS keys, Stripe keys, database credentials embedded in code
Private keys stored directly in variables
fix: Move all secrets to environment variables using process.env
Use a secrets manager like AWS Secrets Manager or HashiCorp Vault
Never commit .env files to version control

rules.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_ on secret variables
rules.description: Variables with NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix are exposed to the browser. Use them only for public config.
rules.title: Remove NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix from secret variables
catches: NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix on secret environment variables
Private keys, API secrets, or tokens exposed to client-side code
fix: Remove NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix from any secret variables
Use server-side only environment variables for sensitive data

rules.name: Logging sensitive data
rules.description: Logging sensitive data (passwords, tokens, PII). Use redaction or exclude from logs.
rules.title: Remove sensitive data from logs
catches: Logging passwords, tokens, API keys, or other secrets
Logging PII like emails, phone numbers, or addresses
Logging full request bodies that may contain sensitive data
fix: Use structured logging that excludes sensitive fields
Never log req.body, headers, or authentication tokens

rules.name: Credentials in URL parameters
rules.description: Credentials in URL params are visible in browser history and logs. Use headers or body instead.
rules.title: Remove credentials from URL
catches: API keys or passwords passed in URL query parameters
Credentials visible in browser history and server logs
Tokens or secrets in URL paths
fix: Move credentials to HTTP headers or request body
Use Authorization header with Bearer tokens

rules.name: Cookie without secure flag
rules.description: Cookies with credentials should have Secure and HttpOnly flags set.
rules.title: Add secure flag to cookies
catches: Cookies set without Secure flag (can be sent over HTTP)
Cookies without HttpOnly flag (accessible via JavaScript)
fix: Add HttpOnly flag to prevent XSS access
Add SameSite attribute for CSRF protection

rules.name: Self-signed certificate usage
rules.description: Self-signed certificates should not be used in production. Use valid SSL certificates.
rules.title: Use valid SSL certificates
catches: Environment configured to trust invalid certificates
fix: Use valid SSL certificates from trusted CA
Use Let's Encrypt for free certificates
Never disable certificate verification in production

rules.name: SQL injection via string concatenation
rules.description: SQL injection risk. Use parameterized queries or an ORM.
rules.title: Use parameterized queries
catches: SQL queries built with string concatenation
Template literals with variables in SQL
User input directly in query strings
fix: Use an ORM like Prisma or Drizzle
Never concatenate user input into SQL strings

rules.name: Command injection via exec/eval
rules.description: Command injection risk. Avoid shell execution with unsanitized input.
rules.title: Avoid exec/eval with user input
catches: Using exec() or execSync() with string concatenation
Dynamic code execution with user-controlled strings
fix: Avoid exec/eval with user input entirely
Use child_process with array arguments instead of shell strings
Use JSON.parse instead of eval for data

rules.name: IDOR - missing ownership verification
rules.description: IDOR risk: Verify user ownership before accessing or modifying resources.
rules.title: Add ownership verification
catches: API endpoints that return data based on ID without verifying ownership
User able to access other users' data by changing IDs
fix: Add ownership verification before data access
Check that req.user.id matches the requested resource owner

rules.name: Missing input validation
rules.description: Validate user inputs using Zod, Yup, or similar libraries.
rules.title: Add input validation
catches: User input used directly without validation
fix: Add Zod or Yup validation schemas

rules.name: Debug mode enabled in production
rules.description: Debug mode should be disabled in production.
rules.title: Disable debug mode in production
catches: Debug mode enabled in production configuration
Verbose error reporting exposed to users
fix: Disable debug mode in production configs

rules.name: Weak authentication policy
rules.description: Add password strength validation and requirements.
rules.title: Strengthen password policy
fix: Add password strength validation with zxcvbn
Enforce minimum password length and complexity
Check passwords against common password lists

rules.name: Unvalidated URL redirects
rules.description: SSRF risk: Validate and sanitize URLs before fetching.
rules.title: Validate URL before fetching
catches: Fetching URLs from user input without validation
Server making requests to internal infrastructure
fix: Block internal IP ranges and private addresses
Use URL parser to verify hostname before fetching

rules.name: Hardcoded encryption keys
rules.description: Encryption keys must be loaded from environment variables, never hardcoded.
rules.title: Remove hardcoded encryption keys
catches: Encryption keys hardcoded in source files
fix: Load encryption keys from environment variables
Use key management services like AWS KMS
Never commit keys to version control

rules.name: Unvalidated file uploads
rules.description: File uploads must be validated. Check file type, size, and content.
rules.title: Validate file uploads
fix: Validate file type using magic numbers, not just extension
Store files outside web root with random names

rules.name: Using vulnerable/outdated components
rules.description: Using outdated dependencies with known vulnerabilities. Run npm audit and update regularly.
rules.title: Update dependencies regularly
catches: Outdated npm packages without vulnerability scanning
fix: Run npm audit in CI/CD pipeline
Set up Dependabot for automated PRs

rules.name: Insufficient security logging
rules.description: Log security-relevant events including login failures, access control violations, and server errors.
rules.title: Add security logging
catches: Missing audit trail for sensitive operations
No logging of access control violations
fix: Log all login attempts (success and failure)
Log admin actions and sensitive data access

rules.name: Missing security headers
rules.description: Add security headers including Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options.
rules.title: Add security headers
fix: Set X-Frame-Options to DENY or SAMEORIGIN

rules.name: Sensitive headers in response
rules.description: Remove headers like X-Powered-By that reveal server information.
rules.title: Remove sensitive headers from response
fix: Use Helmet to strip sensitive headers
Configure server to hide version info

rules.name: Weak cryptographic cipher
rules.description: Use strong cryptographic ciphers. Avoid weak ones like DES or RC4.
rules.title: Use strong ciphers
catches: Using DES, RC4, or other deprecated ciphers
fix: Disable weak ciphers like DES and RC4

rules.name: JWT with 'none' algorithm
rules.description: JWT with 'none' algorithm is insecure. Use RS256 or HS256.
rules.title: Use proper JWT algorithms

rules.name: Potential XSS via innerHTML
rules.description: Using innerHTML can lead to XSS attacks. Use textContent or sanitize input.
rules.title: Avoid innerHTML
fix: Sanitize HTML with DOMPurify before rendering

rules.name: Regex DoS vulnerability
rules.description: User input in regex can lead to ReDoS attacks. Validate and limit input.
rules.title: Use safe regex patterns
catches: User input used in regex patterns

rules.name: Missing Content Security Policy
rules.description: CSP helps prevent XSS and data injection attacks.
rules.title: Add Content Security Policy
catches: XSS attacks can load external scripts
fix: Add CSP header with strict policy
Define allowed sources for scripts, styles, images
Start with report-only mode to find issues

rules.name: CORS wildcard origin
rules.description: Using wildcard origin in CORS is insecure. Specify explicit origins.
rules.title: Restrict CORS origins
catches: Any website can access your API
Credentials can be sent to any origin

rules.name: Missing X-Frame-Options
rules.description: Prevents clickjacking attacks by controlling iframe embedding.
rules.title: Add X-Frame-Options header
catches: Site can be embedded in iframes

rules.name: Missing HSTS header
rules.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security forces HTTPS connections.
rules.title: Enable HSTS
catches: Site accessible over HTTP after HTTPS
fix: Add preload flag for browser inclusion

rules.name: Missing X-Content-Type-Options
rules.description: Prevents MIME type sniffing attacks.
rules.title: Add X-Content-Type-Options

rules.name: Potential path traversal
rules.description: User input used in file paths can lead to path traversal attacks. Validate and sanitize paths.
rules.title: Validate file paths
fix: Validate path is within expected directory

rules.name: XML External Entity vulnerability
rules.description: XXE attacks can read local files. Disable external entity processing.
rules.title: Disable XML external entities
fix: Disable external entities in XML parser

rules.name: Insecure random number generation
rules.description: Math.random() is not cryptographically secure. Use crypto.randomBytes() or crypto.randomUUID().
rules.title: Use secure random generation
catches: Session IDs or tokens generated with Math.random()
Predictable random values used for security
fix: Never use Math.random() for security purposes

rules.name: Potential prototype pollution
rules.description: User input merged into objects can pollute prototypes. Use safe merge libraries.
rules.title: Prevent prototype pollution
catches: User input merged into objects without sanitization

rules.name: Insecure deserialization
rules.description: Deserializing untrusted data is dangerous. Use JSON.parse() or safe libraries.
rules.title: Use safe deserialization

rules.name: SQL query without parameterization
rules.description: SQL queries should use parameterized inputs to prevent injection.
rules.title: Use parameterized queries

rules.name: Potential race condition in financial operations
rules.description: Use transactions or locking for operations that modify balances or counts.
rules.title: Prevent race conditions in financial ops
fix: Use optimistic locking with version field

rules.name: Potential timing attack
rules.description: Variable-time comparisons can leak timing information. Use crypto.timingSafeEqual().
rules.title: Use constant-time comparisons
fix: Compare hashes instead of raw values

rules.name: Dependency override vulnerability
rules.description: Dependency overrides can introduce malicious code. Audit all overrides.
rules.title: Audit dependency overrides
fix: Use direct dependencies instead of overrides

rules.name: Potential typosquatting attack
rules.description: Check for typosquatting attacks in dependencies. Use exact versions.
rules.title: Verify package names
catches: Package names that could be typosquatted
fix: Use npm audit to check for issues

rules.name: Verbose error information leakage
rules.description: Error handlers should not expose raw error messages, stack traces, or internal details to clients.
rules.title: Sanitize error messages
catches: Raw error messages returned to clients
Database schema details in error messages
fix: Return generic error messages to users

rules.name: NoSQL injection vulnerability
rules.description: NoSQL queries should not accept user input directly. Use query builders or sanitize operators.
rules.title: Use parameterized NoSQL queries
catches: User input directly in MongoDB queries

rules.name: Timing-based information disclosure
rules.description: Login and authentication should use constant-time comparisons to prevent username enumeration.
rules.title: Use constant-time comparisons
catches: Early return when user not found in login
Different response times for valid vs invalid usernames
fix: Always perform password comparison even if user not found
Return same response time regardless of user existence

rules.name: Type juggling vulnerability
rules.description: Use strict equality (===) instead of loose equality (==) in security checks.
rules.title: Use strict equality
catches: Loose equality that can be bypassed

rules.name: Open redirect vulnerability
rules.description: Redirect URLs must be validated against an allowlist. Never trust user-supplied URLs.
rules.title: Validate redirect URLs
catches: Redirecting to URLs from user input
fix: Verify URL is relative or from trusted domain

rules.name: Insecure session storage
rules.description: JWTs and tokens should be stored in HttpOnly cookies, not localStorage or sessionStorage.
rules.title: Use secure session storage

rules.name: Plaintext password storage
rules.description: Passwords must be hashed using bcrypt, argon2, or scrypt before storing in database.
rules.title: Hash passwords before storage
fix: Hash passwords with bcrypt or argon2

rules.name: Unprotected attribute injection
rules.description: Database update operations should whitelist allowed fields. Never spread user input directly.
rules.title: Whitelist allowed fields
catches: User input spread directly into database updates
Users can set admin flags via API
fix: Never allow role/is_admin in user input

rules.name: Hardcoded default credentials
rules.description: Seed scripts and migrations should not contain default admin accounts. Remove before production.
rules.title: Remove default credentials
catches: Default admin accounts in seed data
fix: Require password change on first login

rules.name: Weak JWT secret constant
rules.description: JWT secrets must be long, random strings loaded from environment variables.
rules.title: Use strong JWT secrets
fix: Use 256+ bit random secret from environment

rules.name: Client-side validation only
rules.description: Client-side validation can be bypassed. Always validate on the server as well.
rules.title: Add server-side validation
catches: Only HTML5/form validation without server check
fix: Add server-side validation with Zod or Yup
Validate in API routes before processing

rules.name: Unverified JWT signature
rules.description: JWT tokens must have their signatures verified. Never trust decoded payload without verification.
rules.title: Verify JWT signatures
catches: Trusting JWT payload without signature check

rules.name: Dependency confusion attack risk
rules.description: Configure npm/pnpm to prefer private registries over public for internal packages.
rules.title: Secure package resolution
catches: npm configured to pull from wrong registry
Malicious package with same name as internal
fix: Configure npm to use private registry
Use scoped packages for internal code

rules.name: Unicode normalization vulnerability
rules.description: Account recovery should normalize Unicode characters to prevent homograph attacks.
rules.title: Normalize Unicode strings
catches: Unicode characters not normalized in usernames
Different Unicode chars that look the same

rules.name: Weak random for security tokens
rules.description: Security tokens (password reset, session IDs) must use crypto.randomBytes() or crypto.randomUUID().
rules.title: Use cryptographically secure random

rules.name: Dangerous eval usage
rules.description: eval(), new Function(), and similar functions with user input lead to RCE vulnerabilities.
rules.title: Avoid eval with user input
fix: Never use eval with user input

rules.name: Insecure temporary file creation
rules.description: Temporary files should be created with secure random names in secure directories.
rules.title: Use secure temp file handling
fix: Use OS temp directory with secure permissions

rules.name: Dynamic code execution risk
rules.description: Dynamic import or require with user input can lead to RCE.
rules.title: Avoid dynamic imports with user input

rules.name: Git directory exposure risk
rules.description: Web servers should deny access to .git directories to prevent repository exposure.
rules.title: Block .git directory access

rules.name: Client-side cryptographic signing
rules.description: Cryptographic signing and token generation should happen server-side, not in frontend.
rules.title: Move crypto operations to server

rules.name: Homebrewed cryptography
rules.description: Use Node.js crypto or libraries like crypto-js. Never implement custom encryption.
rules.title: Use standard cryptographic libraries
fix: Use SHA-256 or better for hashing

rules.name: Using React patterns in Solid
rules.description: SolidJS uses signals, not hooks like React. Do not use useState, useEffect.
rules.title: Use SolidJS reactivity correctly

rules.name: Mutating arrays in reactivity
rules.description: SolidJS reactivity requires reassignment, not mutation. Use [...arr] pattern.
rules.title: Use immutable patterns for arrays
catches: UI not updating on array changes

rules.name: For loop without key
rules.description: SolidJS For component needs a key function for proper list updates.
rules.title: Add key to For component
fix: Add key function to For component

rules.name: Global state mutation
rules.description: Mutating global state leads to unpredictable behavior.
rules.title: Don't mutate global state

rules.name: Direct array state mutation
rules.description: Directly mutating state arrays won't trigger re-renders.
rules.title: Use immutable state updates
fix: Create new array with spread or map

rules.name: Missing unsubscribe on destroy
rules.description: Always unsubscribe from stores in onDestroy to prevent memory leaks.
rules.title: Unsubscribe from stores on destroy

rules.name: $: with mutation instead of reassignment
rules.description: Svelte reactivity works with assignment, not mutation. Use assignment to trigger updates.
rules.title: Use assignment instead of mutation

rules.name: Await block without catch
rules.description: Await blocks should have catch for error handling.
rules.title: Add error handling to await blocks

rules.name: Spreading props to slots
rules.description: Spreading props to slots can cause maintenance issues.
rules.title: Avoid spreading props to slots

rules.name: Manual event forwarding
rules.description: Use event forwarding instead of manual forwarding.
rules.title: Use event forwarding

rules.name: Context used incorrectly
rules.description: Context must be set in onMount or asynchronously.
rules.title: Fix context usage

rules.name: onDestroy without onMount pattern
rules.description: Always cleanup subscriptions and timers in onDestroy.
rules.title: Add cleanup in onDestroy

rules.name: Global styles in component
rules.description: Global styles should be in global CSS files.
rules.title: Avoid global styles in components

rules.name: $state without proper immutability
rules.description: Use $state with proper immutability patterns.
rules.title: Use immutable tracking correctly

rules.name: Missing transition on conditionally rendered
rules.description: Use transitions for better UX with conditionally rendered elements.
rules.title: Add transitions to conditionally rendered elements

rules.name: Missing test coverage configuration
rules.description: Configure test coverage to track code quality. Add coverage configuration to your test runner.
rules.title: Add test coverage configuration
fix: Add coverage config to test runner

rules.name: Missing coverage thresholds
rules.description: Add coverage thresholds to enforce minimum code coverage standards in CI.
rules.title: Set minimum coverage thresholds

rules.name: Test coverage below threshold
rules.description: Test coverage is below recommended threshold. Aim for 80%+ coverage.
rules.title: Improve test coverage

rules.name: Files without corresponding tests
rules.description: Source files should have corresponding test files.
rules.title: Add test files

rules.name: No E2E tests for UI project
rules.description: Projects with UI components should have E2E tests to verify user flows work correctly.
rules.title: Add E2E tests
fix: Write E2E tests for key user flows
Test critical paths in real browser

rules.name: Mutation in query procedure
rules.description: Query procedures should be pure. Use mutation for side effects (database writes, etc.).
rules.title: Use mutation for side effects

rules.name: Procedure without input schema
rules.description: Procedures should have Zod input schemas for validation.
rules.title: Add input validation schema

rules.name: No error handling in caller
rules.description: When calling procedures, handle errors properly.
rules.title: Add error handling in caller

rules.name: Using 'any' type
rules.description: Using `any` defeats TypeScript type safety. Use specific types or `unknown` if truly dynamic.
rules.title: Avoid using `any` type

rules.name: Implicit any in function params
rules.description: Function parameters without type annotations default to `any`. Add explicit types.
rules.title: Add type annotation for implicit any

rules.name: Unsafe optional chaining depth
rules.description: Deep optional chaining can be hard to reason about. Consider explicit checks.
rules.title: Avoid unsafe optional chaining depth

rules.name: Type assertion overriding TypeScript
