rules.description: Type assertions bypass TypeScript type checking. Use proper types.
rules.title: Avoid type assertions

rules.name: Numeric enum usage
rules.description: Numeric enums have issues. Use const objects or string enums instead.
rules.title: Avoid numeric enums

rules.name: Interface merging
rules.description: Interface merging can cause unexpected behavior. Use type aliases instead.
rules.title: Avoid interface merging

rules.name: Class decorator impact
rules.description: Decorators can impact performance. Use them carefully.
rules.title: Consider decorator impact

rules.name: Consider explicit generic types
rules.description: Consider using explicit generic type parameters for clarity. This is a suggestion - ignore if your pattern is intentional.
rules.title: Consider explicit generic types

rules.name: Implicit any type
rules.description: Variables without type annotations default to any. Enable strict mode.
rules.title: Enable noImplicitAny

rules.name: Missing strict null checks
rules.description: Enable strictNullChecks to handle null/undefined properly.
rules.title: Enable strictNullChecks

rules.name: Unused variables or imports
rules.description: Unused variables and imports reduce code quality.
rules.title: Remove unused code

rules.name: Insufficient type narrowing
rules.description: Use type guards and narrowing to ensure type safety.
rules.title: Use proper type narrowing

rules.name: Missing discriminated unions
rules.description: Use discriminated unions for better type safety.
rules.title: Use discriminated unions

rules.name: Unhandled exhaustive cases
rules.description: Use never type for exhaustive switch/case matching.
rules.title: Ensure exhaustive matching

rules.name: Consider parameter ordering
rules.description: Consider putting required parameters before optional ones for clearer APIs. This is a suggestion - ignore if intentional.
rules.title: Consider parameter ordering

rules.name: Missing fs/promises import
rules.description: Import async functions from 'fs/promises' instead of 'fs'. The 'fs' module exports callback-based functions, not promises.
rules.title: Use fs/promises for async file operations

rules.name: Synchronous fs in async function
rules.description: Synchronous fs operations (readFileSync, writeFileSync, etc.) block the event loop. Use async versions from fs/promises.
rules.title: Use async fs functions in async contexts

rules.name: Unsafe typeof comparison
rules.description: typeof is unreliable for complex type checks. Use Array.isArray(), instanceof, or strict equality checks.
rules.title: Use proper type checking

rules.name: Regex created inside loop
rules.description: Creating new RegExp inside loops causes repeated compilation. Move outside and reuse.
rules.title: Move regex outside loop

rules.name: Exported function missing return type
rules.description: Exported functions should have explicit return types for better API documentation and type safety.
rules.title: Add return types to exported functions

rules.name: Missing file size limit
rules.description: Unlimited uploads can cause DoS. Set reasonable limits.
rules.title: Limit file upload sizes
fix: Set file size limit in middleware

rules.name: Missing file type validation
rules.description: Check MIME type and extension. Don't trust client-provided types.
rules.title: Validate file types

rules.name: Files not scanned for viruses
rules.description: Scan files for malware before processing or storing.
rules.title: Scan uploaded files

rules.name: Uploaded files not renamed
rules.description: Don't use original filename. Generate UUID to prevent overwrites and path traversal.
rules.title: Generate unique filenames

rules.name: Files stored locally in container
rules.description: Store uploads in S3, GCS, or similar. Local storage is lost on restart.
rules.title: Use object storage
fix: Use S3, GCS, or Azure Blob

rules.name: Large files not using chunked upload
rules.description: Large files should use resumable uploads for reliability.
rules.title: Implement chunked uploads
fix: Use tus or Uppy for uploads

rules.name: No Error State
rules.description: Components should handle error states gracefully.
rules.title: Add error state handling

rules.name: Missing CLI help
rules.description: CLI should provide --help flag with usage information.
rules.title: Add help command

rules.name: Missing CLI version
rules.description: CLI should provide --version flag.
rules.title: Add version flag

rules.name: No progress indicator for long operations
rules.description: Long-running operations should show progress indicators.
rules.title: Add progress indicator

rules.name: No confirmation for destructive actions
rules.description: Destructive actions should require user confirmation.
rules.title: Add confirmation prompts

rules.name: No command suggestions for typos
rules.description: CLI should suggest correct commands when users make typos.
rules.title: Add command suggestions

rules.name: Mutating prop in component
rules.description: Props should be treated as read-only. Use a local copy if you need to modify it.
rules.title: Do not mutate props
fix: Emit events to parent for changes

rules.name: v-for without key
rules.description: v-for should always have a unique key for proper list rendering.
rules.title: Add key to v-for

rules.name: watch without immediate option
rules.description: If you need the initial value in watch, use immediate: true.
rules.title: Use immediate option for watch on mount
catches: Watch doesn't run on initial value
fix: Consider using watchEffect for simpler cases
Handle both initial and change cases

rules.name: Unreactive object mutation
rules.description: Mutating objects directly breaks Vue reactivity. Use reactive() properly.
rules.title: Fix unreactive object mutation

rules.name: Composable with side effects
rules.description: Composables with side effects should be explicit about them.
rules.title: Avoid side effects in composables

rules.name: Deep selectors in scoped CSS
rules.description: Deep selectors in scoped CSS can cause maintenance issues.
rules.title: Avoid deep selectors in scoped CSS
fix: Use scoped CSS without deep selectors

rules.name: Async component without loading
rules.description: Async components should have a loading component.
rules.title: Add loading component for async components

rules.name: Emits without declaration
rules.description: Emits should be declared in the component for type safety.
rules.title: Declare emits in component

rules.name: Wrong reactivity primitive
rules.description: Use ref() for primitives and reactive() for objects.
rules.title: Use correct reactivity primitive
fix: Use ref() for primitives (string, number, boolean)

rules.name: Provide/inject without reactivity
rules.description: Provide/inject should maintain reactivity.
rules.title: Use provide/inject correctly

rules.name: String-based store actions
rules.description: String-based actions reduce type safety. Use typed actions.
rules.title: Use typed store actions

rules.name: Using deprecated mixins
rules.description: Mixins are deprecated. Use composables instead.
rules.title: Avoid using mixins

rules.name: WebSocket missing heartbeat
rules.description: Heartbeats detect disconnected clients and prevent stale connections.
rules.title: Implement heartbeat/ping-pong

rules.name: Client missing reconnection logic
rules.description: Auto-reconnect when connection is lost.
rules.title: Add reconnection handling

rules.name: WebSocket without authentication
rules.description: WebSocket connections should be authenticated on handshake.
rules.title: Authenticate WebSocket connections

rules.name: Using string messages instead of typed objects
rules.description: Use JSON with type field for better debugging and validation.
rules.title: Use typed message format

rules.name: Broadcasting to all instead of rooms
rules.description: Broadcast to specific rooms rather than all connected clients.
rules.title: Use rooms for targeted broadcasts
fix: Join user to room by ID

rules.name: WebSocket missing rate limiting
rules.description: Limit message frequency per client to prevent abuse.
rules.title: Rate limit messages
